metadata.method_name: M2' Safety-Relevant Absorption-Structured Downstream Win (or Honest-Null) vs u_sub
metadata.description: Build safety identity slices inline (religion/race/orientation/nationality via civil_comments gazetteer + content-flip templates); run a $0 recall-hole + firing-Jaccard absorption screen on the frozen Gemma-Scope L12/16k JumpReLU SAE; CONDITIONALLY run KG-named single-absorber ablation vs u_sub=diff-of-means(target, SIBLINGS) at matched forget on a joint retain-utility x fluency LLM judge. Georgia/Jordan are an end-to-end positive control. NO_SAFETY_ABSORPTION is the publishable capping limitation.

screens.parent_desc: token is part of a country name
token names a religion / religious group
token names a race / ethnicity / identity group
token names a sexual orientation / gender identity

honest_negatives: Safety-attribute SAE absorption is HOMOGRAPH-CONFINED: of 44 eligible safety identity groups across 4 hierarchies, only 2 are absorption-structured (['white', 'straight']), and ALL of them are lexical homographs. Descriptive identity terms (e.g. Muslim/Hindu/Catholic, gay/lesbian, Mexican/Chinese/Canadian) show NO parent recall-hole — they co-fire with the general identity parent. Absorption tracks LEXICAL POLYSEMY (like Georgia/Jordan), not safety semantics. This is the publishable scoping/capping finding.

POSITIVE CONTROL Georgia (absorber 16009): win_verdict=DOWNSTREAM_WIN_CONFIRMED vs the SUB-CONTEXT dense direction u_sub (target-vs-SIBLINGS), recall-hole 0.7666666666666666, firing-Jaccard 0.012505862122870096, curve-dominance 1.00.
race_ethnicity_white: NO_ON_TARGET_EFFECT — KG ablation did not move the forget target; excluded from selectivity means.

orientation_gender_straight: SAFETY_WIN_CONFIRMED (primary judge) but SMALL-MAGNITUDE — matched on-target forget KL is only 0.0012 (vs Georgia ~0.052); the PRIMARY-judge joint CI excludes 0, but the SECOND judge (gemini) is BORDERLINE (Δ=0.11666666664861114, CI excl 0 = False); the absolute edit is tiny and model-internal collateral favoured KG=False. Absorption STRUCTURE is present; unlearning LEVERAGE is weak / not robust across judges. Reported honestly.

race_ethnicity_white: absorption-structured in the screen (recall-hole / firing-disjoint absorber) but its absorber has NO_ON_TARGET_EFFECT downstream (matched forget 0.0004); absorption STRUCTURE does not guarantee unlearning LEVERAGE.

scoping_summary.interpretation: Safety-attribute SAE absorption is HOMOGRAPH-CONFINED: of 44 eligible safety identity groups across 4 hierarchies, only 2 are absorption-structured (['white', 'straight']), and ALL of them are lexical homographs. Descriptive identity terms (e.g. Muslim/Hindu/Catholic, gay/lesbian, Mexican/Chinese/Canadian) show NO parent recall-hole — they co-fire with the general identity parent. Absorption tracks LEXICAL POLYSEMY (like Georgia/Jordan), not safety semantics. This is the publishable scoping/capping finding.
